# Project Analysis: Home Stay Platform

**Generated:** 2026-04-06
**Generated By:** @architect (Aria)
**Mode:** YOLO (Full Scan)

---

## Project Overview

| Aspect | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Framework** | Next.js 15 App Router (React 19) |
| **Language** | TypeScript (100% — 360 files, 0 JS) |
| **Styling** | Tailwind CSS |
| **Auth & DB** | Supabase (Postgres + Auth + RLS) |
| **Payments** | Stripe (v20.4.0, API 2026-02-25.clover) |
| **Email** | Resend |
| **i18n** | next-intl (PT, PT-BR, EN-US) |
| **Testing** | Jest (35 unit tests) + Playwright (5 E2E specs) |
| **Deployment** | Vercel |
| **Middleware** | 298 lines (security headers, auth, rate limiting, subscription check) |

---

## Architecture Layers

### 1. Pages Layer (`src/app/`)

**Locale-aware pages** (`src/app/[locale]/`): 18 page groups

| Domain | Pages | Notes |
|--------|-------|-------|
| Dashboard | 1 | Financial cards + charts |
| Reservations | 4 | CRUD + export + edit |
| Properties | 4 | CRUD + images + edit |
| Calendar | 1 | Interactive calendar |
| Expenses | 3 | CRUD + edit |
| Owners | 3 | CRUD + fiscal |
| Reports | 1 | Financial reports |
| Financial | 1 | Financial overview |
| Settings | 1 | User settings |
| Admin | 1 | Admin panel |

**Non-locale pages:** auth, login, register, onboarding, subscribe, landing, terms, privacy

### 2. API Layer (`src/app/api/`)

**50 API route files** across **21 domains:**

| Domain | Routes | Purpose |
|--------|--------|---------|
| `stripe/` | 3 | Checkout, webhook, booking-webhook |
| `properties/` | 5 | CRUD, images, iCal token, delete, status |
| `owners/` | 3 | CRUD, fiscal, reports |
| `reservations/` | 2 | CRUD, cleanup |
| `email/` | 5 | Connect, disconnect, sync, worker, callback |
| `cron/` | 3 | Daily check-ins, cleanup, email-parser |
| `sync/` | 1 | iCal import |
| `organization/` | 2 | Org settings, members |
| `users/` | 2 | User management |
| `webhooks/` | 1 | Booking.com reservation webhook |
| `public/` | 2 | Bookings, property availability |
| `admin/` | 2 | Run cron, apply migration |
| Others | 9 | Calendar, iCal, notifications, reports, etc. |

### 3. Library Layer (`src/lib/`)

| Module | Files | Purpose |
|--------|-------|---------|
| `auth/` | 5 | requireRole, getUserRole, getUserProperties, getUserAccess |
| `supabase/` | 4 | admin, client, config, server |
| `email/` | 3 | Resend, booking confirmation, queue |
| `email-parser/` | 4 | Gmail client, parser, crypto, platforms |
| `ical/` | 2 | iCal service, booking parser |
| `i18n/` | 5+ | Translations, locale detection |
| `currency/` | 1 | Multi-currency utils |
| `forex/` | 2 | EUR/BRL/USD conversion, Redis caching |
| `pricing/` | 2 | Pricing rules engine |
| `commission/` | 3 | Commission service + tests |
| `financial/` | 2 | Financial calculations |
| `billing/` | 2 | Plan features, subscription check |
| `cache/` | 2 | Profile cache, subscription cache |
| `utils/` | 5 | Currency, pagination, channels, slugify |

### 4. Components Layer (`src/components/`)

**23 component groups** including:
- `ui/` — 17 base UI components (shadcn/ui pattern)
- `dashboard/` — Financial cards, charts
- `reservations/` — Forms, filters, PDF generator
- `properties/` — Management, listings
- `calendar/` — Interactive calendar, modals
- `reports/` — Financial reports, PDF export
- `settings/` — User preferences
- `i18n/` — Locale selector
- `landing/` — Landing page
- `layout/` — Sidebar, header

### 5. Database Layer (`supabase/`)

| Aspect | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Migrations** | 48 files (20260100 → 20260406) |
| **Core Tables** | organizations, user_profiles, properties, property_listings, reservations, expenses, owners, guests, platforms, pricing_rules, audit_logs |
| **RLS** | Comprehensive — org-isolated, role-based (admin, gestor, viewer, guest) |
| **Triggers** | validate_minimum_stay, auto-assign manager properties, user profile trigger |
| **Functions** | get_user_organization_id(), get_my_profile(), is_admin_or_manager() |

---

## Security Architecture

| Layer | Implementation |
|-------|----------------|
| **Headers** | HSTS, X-Frame-Options DENY, CSP, nosniff, Permissions-Policy |
| **Auth** | Supabase Auth + JWT + session refresh in middleware |
| **Authorization** | 4 roles (admin, gestor, viewer, guest) + guest subtypes (staff, owner) |
| **RLS** | All tables — organization-isolated, role-checked |
| **Rate Limiting** | Upstash Redis sliding window (fallback: in-memory) |
| **CSRF** | Middleware-level protection |
| **Input** | Zod schemas for API validation |
| **Admin Protection** | Cannot edit/delete/change-role of admin user |

---

## Multi-Tenancy Model

- **Isolation:** `organization_id` on all data tables
- **Enforcement:** `get_user_organization_id()` SQL function in RLS policies
- **Default Org:** `00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001`
- **Plans:** Free, Professional (Stripe subscription)

---

| Integration | Type | Status |

| **Booking.com iCal** | Import sync (cron + manual) | Active |

| **Booking.com API** | Native webhook | Paused |
| **Stripe Checkout** | Subscription payments | Active |
| **Stripe Booking** | Direct booking payments | Active |
| **Resend** | Transactional email | Active |
| **Gmail** | Email parsing for reservations | Active |

## Testing Coverage

| Type | Count | Framework | Status |
|------|-------|-----------|--------|
| **Unit Tests** | 35 files | Jest | Active |
| **E2E Tests** | 5 specs | Playwright | In setup |
| **Integration Tests** | 3 files | Jest | Active |
| **RLS Tests** | 2 files | Jest + Supabase | Active |

**Key test areas:** auth, iCal parsing, pricing, commission, financial, API routes, RLS policies

---

## Patterns & Conventions

| Pattern | Implementation |
|---------|----------------|
| **Client/Server Supabase** | `createClient()` (browser, RLS) vs `createAdminClient()` (server, bypass RLS) |
| **Auth Guard** | `requireRole()` → returns userId, role, organizationId, guestType |
| **API Pattern** | Route handlers with requireRole + Zod validation |
| **Component Pattern** | Server components (default) + client islands |
| **i18n** | Root-first, locale-optional routing (`/` works, `/pt-br/dashboard` works) |
| **Naming** | Portuguese UI labels, English code |
| **Commits** | Conventional commits (feat:, fix:, docs:, chore:) |

---

## Known Technical Debt

| Item | Severity | Notes |
|------|----------|-------|
| Duplicate page routes | Medium | Both `src/app/reservations/` and `src/app/[locale]/reservations/` exist |
| `.bak` files in tree | Low | `page.tsx.bak` files should be cleaned |
| Escaped locale dir | Low | `src/app/\[locale\]/` ghost directory (empty) |
| 298-line middleware | Medium | Complex — could benefit from splitting |
| No CI/CD pipeline | High | No GitHub Actions for automated testing |
| E2E test environment | In Progress | `.env.test` separation being set up in parallel session |
